repair_attempts.sql: SELECT DISTINCT pa.player_api_id, p.player_name, pa.overall_rating FROM player_attributes AS pa JOIN player AS p ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id WHERE pa.overall_rating = (SELECT MAX(overall_rating) FROM player_attributes) ORDER BY pa.player_api_id;
